# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 6.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| 5.x.x   | :warning:          |
| < 5.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**For security issues**, use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting:

1. Go to https://github.com/pwafire/pwafire/security/advisories/new
2. Click "Report a vulnerability"
3. Provide details: description, impact, reproduction steps
4. We'll respond within 48 hours

**For non-sensitive issues**: Open a public issue at https://github.com/pwafire/pwafire/issues

## Security Best Practices

- Request user permissions responsibly
- Validate all user input before processing
- Use HTTPS (required for PWA APIs)
- Sanitize user-generated content
- Follow proper Content Security Policy

Thank you for helping keep PWAFire secure!
